model.visual_discovery_boardroom_mart.ad.name: ad_revenue_by_surface
model.visual_discovery_boardroom_mart.ad.description: Synthetic monthly visual-discovery advertising revenue by monetization surface.

surface.name: surface
surface.description: Visual-discovery monetization surface, such as Performance Shopping Ads, Visual Search Ads, or Brand Video Ads.

net_revenue_millions.name: net_revenue_millions
net_revenue_millions.description: Synthetic net advertising revenue in USD millions after traffic acquisition and credits.

engaged_users_millions.name: engaged_users_millions
engaged_users_millions.description: Synthetic monthly engaged users attributed to the surface, in millions.

commercial_searches_billions.name: commercial_searches_billions
commercial_searches_billions.description: Synthetic commercial-intent search and visual discovery events attributed to the surface, in billions.

meta.grain: one row per month and monetization surface

metrics.name: net_ad_revenue
metrics.description: Net advertising revenue generated by visual-discovery monetization surfaces.
caveats: Synthetic demo data; not reported company financials.
Revenue is expressed in USD millions.

metrics.name: commercial_search_intensity
metrics.description: Commercial-intent search and visual discovery events per engaged user.
caveats: Synthetic proxy for shopping intent and visual discovery engagement.
Do not compare to public company MAU or search disclosures.

metric.visual_discovery_boardroom_mart.n.name: net_ad_revenue
metric.visual_discovery_boardroom_mart.n.description: Net advertising revenue across visual-discovery monetization surfaces.
